mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT permission_code FROM ( SELECT aup.permission_code FROM admin_user_permission aup JOIN admin_permission_policy app ON app.permission_code = aup.permission_code AND app.active = 1 WHERE aup.user_id = #{userId} AND aup.revoked_at IS NULL
UNION
SELECT agi.permission_code FROM admin_user_group aug JOIN admin_permission_group apg ON apg.group_code = aug.group_code AND apg.active = 1 JOIN admin_permission_group_item agi ON agi.group_code = aug.group_code JOIN admin_permission_policy app2 ON app2.permission_code = agi.permission_code AND app2.active = 1 WHERE aug.user_id = #{userId} AND aug.revoked_at IS NULL ) effective
